'''''Citadel 2''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] that served with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was sent to [[Rescue at Mon Calamari|rescue]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] scheduled for transport to the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Warrior (Star Destroyer)|''Warrior'']]. ''Citadel 2'' boarded the freighter ''[[Wiggins]]'' containing the slaves and rescued them and, along with ''[[Citadel 1]]'', boarded container [[Xi 1 (Mon Calamari)|''Xi 1'']], rescued the slaves, and escaped into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], while the Rebel [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Halley Kadorto]] fought of wave after wave of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] and [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] that were attempting to destroy the cargo containing the slaves.<ref name="XWOSG">''[[X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide]]''</ref>
